title: Kitty Therapy
description:
Tiger shifter Yongwoo is an actor within the shifter world. At a filming location, he happens to rescue a black cat who'd been abused for being bad luck, and ends up bringing it home to raise it.
He names the kitty 'Dodong', and steadily grows attached to the cat, only to have it disappear without a trace when he wakes up from a nap one day. And with his wallet and valuables whisked off, no less!
The media erupts with reports that accuse Yongwoo of abandoning his rescue pet. In order to quell the public outrage, Yongwoo offers to live along with Haedong, the very same cat shifter who'd pretended to be a cat and tricked him all along.
Raws: https://ridibooks.com/books/3093003333
author: Marine Code
